name: Cameron Vernest
title: CEO
bio: Cameron Vernest serves as Spearhead's CEO and is also a Partner at FirePower Capital. Previously, he held the position of VP of Global Sales and Partnerships at TradeGecko, where he grew ARR from $2M to over $10M in 3 years. He also served as Head of Strategic Partnerships at Shopify and Managing Director of South East Asia at BlackBerry. Cameron holds an MBA in finance and accounting from Wilfrid Laurier University and is a Chartered Professional Accountant.

name: Moritz Christ
title: Managing Director
bio: Moritz Christ serves as Spearhead's Managing Director, overseeing business development and new mandate onboarding. He brings global experience from his previous role at Citigroup's German capital markets division. An accomplished athlete, he competed at the Division I level for Washington State University in football and later contributed to business development for the Washington Commanders organization. Moritz holds a Master of Science in International Management with a Finance specialization from Trinity College, University of Dublin, and a Bachelor's degree in Sports Management and Business Administration from Washington State University.

name: Bobby Malhotra
title: Associate Principal
bio: Bobby serves as an Associate Principal in Spearhead's Origination & Advisory team. Prior to joining the organization, he worked as an M&A Associate at Constellation Software, a publicly traded holding company. His role there involved business development across the pension/actuarial, auto repair, and long-term healthcare divisions. He brings additional financial and sales expertise from previous positions at Global Reach Group and TD Bank. Bobby earned his BA in Public Policy from The University of Toronto.

name: Hunter Morris
title: Associate Principal
bio: Hunter is an Associate Principal in Spearhead's Origination & Advisory team. He co-founded OrderSimply, a food and beverage software company, prior to joining Spearhead. His previous experience includes roles as an Associate at Clarity International and as an Analyst in EY's Private Client Services group. Hunter holds a bachelor's degree from the University of Toronto.

name: Janine Van Niekerk
title: Associate Manager
bio: Janine is an Associate Manager in Spearhead's Origination & Advisory team. She brings over a decade of M&A experience focused on deal origination and research. Before joining Spearhead, she served as Senior Analyst at Benchmark International, a mid-market M&A advisory firm, where she directed a team of analysts responsible for deal sourcing.

name: Joseph Lisi
title: Senior Analyst
bio: Joseph serves as a Senior Analyst on the Origination and M&A Advisory team at Spearhead. Prior to joining the firm, he founded Kuarts, a FinTech company focused on valuation simplification. His professional background includes roles at both a legacy hardware manufacturer and a rapidly expanding waste management firm. He earned an Honors Bachelor of Commerce from McMaster University and is actively working toward his CFA designation.

name: Aaron Dumpala
title: Analyst
bio: Aaron serves as an Analyst on Spearhead's Origination & Advisory team. He combines educational training in Economics and Professional Communications with extensive client engagement experience. Before joining Spearhead, he established a multimedia agency that executed 120+ campaigns with over 100+ clients. His professional background spans a decade of work in operational efficiency, cross-functional team leadership, and technology-driven performance improvements. His skillset encompasses financial oversight and vendor management, with emphasis on enabling scalable growth.

name: Evan Sands
title: Analyst
bio: Evan serves as an Analyst on Spearhead's Origination & Advisory team. Before joining the firm, he worked as a Sous Chef, where he supported people and operations functions with a focus on workforce planning, cost management, and day-to-day execution. His background spans multiple industries, with demonstrated strengths in operations, team leadership, and program delivery, plus experience in sport programming and coaching. Evan holds a B.Sc. in Kinesiology from the University of Guelph, a Post-Graduate Certificate in Sport Business Management from Humber College, and a Diploma in Fitness & Health Promotion from Humber College.

name: Gleb Poliakov
title: Analyst
bio: Gleb serves as an Analyst on the Spearhead Origination & Advisory team. Before joining the firm, he attended the University of Toronto, where he pursued a double major in English and Psychology. Outside of work, he enjoys staying active through gym workouts, hockey, and soccer.

name: Hana Lee
title: Analyst
bio: Hana serves as an Analyst on the Spearhead Origination & Advisory team. Before joining the organization, she gained experience working as an investment and mortgage specialist at TD Canada Trust. She earned a Bachelor of Commerce degree from Macewan University.

name: Isaiah Flores
title: Analyst
bio: Isaiah serves as an Analyst on the Origination and M&A Advisory team at Spearhead. Prior to this role, he worked as an alternatives analyst for a family office, where he focused on marketing and fundraising for alternative investment projects. In that position, he handled deal sourcing, fund screening, and market research activities. He earned a Bachelor of Arts degree in Industrial Relations and Anthropology from the University of Toronto.

name: Jack Searson
title: Analyst
bio: Jack serves as an Analyst on the Spearhead Origination & Advisory team. Prior to his current role, he attended Queen's University, where he split time between the main campus and Queen's International campus at Bader College. His academic focus included a History major and Geography minor.

name: Justin Golden
title: Analyst
bio: Justin is an Analyst on Spearhead's Origination & M&A Advisory team. Before joining the firm, he earned a Bachelor of Business Administration with minors in Management and Managerial Accounting from Concordia University. His entrepreneurial background includes launching a golf-focused social media venture during his university years.

name: Oben Atak
title: Analyst
bio: Oben is an Analyst on the Origination and Advisory team at Spearhead. Prior to joining Spearhead, he worked at Vena Solutions, a financial planning and analysis solution provider, where he served as an SDR on the sales team. Oben earned a Bachelor in Business Administration from Southwestern Christian University.

name: Thomas McLatchie
title: Analyst
bio: Thomas is an Analyst on the Spearhead Origination & Advisory team. Before joining the firm, he worked as an Investment Specialist at BMO and completed an internship with Entrepreneur First. His educational background includes a Bachelor's degree in Business Management from the University of Western Ontario and a Master's degree in International Finance from the University of Glasgow.

name: Reggy Amalrajah
title: Analyst
bio: Reggy serves as an Analyst within Spearhead's Origination & Advisory team. Before joining the firm, he worked as a Content Creation Specialist, helping organizations develop their social media and distribution approaches. He brings several years of marketing expertise from prior roles at Candybox Marketing and freelance work across various sectors.

name: Kalab Tamirat
title: Analyst
bio: Kalab is an Analyst on the M&A and Origination & Advisory team at Spearhead. He previously worked at Sun Life Financial as a Financial Analyst and at Celestica focusing on market research and sales enablement. He is pursuing a degree in Business Management with a Finance minor at Toronto Metropolitan University, where he competes on the Varsity Rugby team.

name: Patrik Geleziunas
title: Junior Analyst
bio: Patrik is a Junior Analyst on Spearhead's Origination and M&A Advisory Team. He holds a Bachelor of Science from the University of Toronto, where he competed for four years on the Varsity soccer team. He also completed the Rotman Certificate in Business Fundamentals, which developed his interest in M&A work.

name: Noa Sandler
title: Vice President
bio: Noa serves as Vice President of Spearhead's Sponsors & Corporates Coverage team. Before joining Spearhead, he worked at Clearco, an investment firm specializing in growth capital for e-commerce businesses. He began in the investment team sourcing opportunities, then transitioned to the venture partnerships team where he assisted portfolio companies with equity fundraising and acquisition preparation. Noa holds a Bachelor of Arts degree in Economics from Queen's University.

name: Ryan Plener
title: Senior Associate
bio: Ryan holds a dual position at Spearhead, supporting both later-stage transactions and business development initiatives. His professional background includes experience with FirePower Capital's Private Capital team, where he evaluated private debt and equity opportunities across multiple sectors. He previously worked at PwC in Assurance and Deals practices, supporting buy- and sell-side mandates. Ryan holds a Bachelor of Business Administration from Wilfrid Laurier University and is a Chartered Professional Accountant (CPA).

name: Jonathan Guttman
title: Analyst
bio: Jonathan serves as an Analyst within Spearhead's Sponsors & Corporates Coverage Team. Previously, he worked at Fengate Asset Management on the Infrastructure Team, where he conducted market research and competitor analysis across multiple industries. He holds a Bachelor of Business Administration degree from Wilfrid Laurier University.

name: Sophia Nash
title: Analyst
bio: Sophia is an Analyst in Spearhead's Sponsors & Corporates Coverage Team. Before joining Spearhead, she worked in business development at Fiix Software, a cloud-based CMMS software company. She holds a bachelor's degree in Business Management from the University of Western Ontario.

name: David Garrard
title: Director, AI
bio: David leads Spearhead's artificial intelligence initiatives and deployments. He brings over 20 years of experience in technology and data leadership across multiple disciplines including AI/ML, analytics, data engineering, visualization, and business process automation. David serves as Chief Data Scientist at Konfidis, a venture-backed residential real estate platform. Previously, he was Chief Technology Officer at Last Call Analytics, where he managed technology teams and focused on systems architecture, analytics modeling, and forecasting. That company was acquired by Ample Organics. His career has spanned Consumer Packaged Goods, Finance, Energy, Loyalty, Healthcare, and Marketing sectors. David holds a BA in Economics from the University of Waterloo.

name: Oren Horovitz
title: Director
bio: Oren serves as a Director within Spearhead's Research and Analytics division, where he concentrates on big data and ML/AI efforts. His recent professional background includes a senior leadership position at PwC's Value Creation group, assisting investment firms and portfolio companies in realizing deal value through analytical methods. Previously, he directed the Investment Analytics group at MRI Software, where he managed long-term forecasting and benchmarking initiatives for substantial real estate portfolios. Oren holds an undergraduate business degree from Colman in Israel.

name: Jake Anderson
title: Associate Manager, Data Science & AI
bio: Jake is a Senior Data Scientist within Spearhead's Research & Analytics division. Before joining the firm, he conducted industry research at a manufacturing non-profit and held a data analytics position at a technology startup. He earned his MSc in Business Analytics from Ivey Business School and completed his undergraduate studies in Economics at Western University.

name: Aianna Difuntorum
title: Manager
bio: Aianna is a Manager in Spearhead's Research & Analytics team. Previously, she worked as an Analyst at Energy Profiles, a data-management consulting firm specializing in energy and sustainability, where she performed data analysis, accounting support and office management. She holds a degree from the University of Toronto, where she studied History, Political and Economic Anthropology.

name: Michael Toivonen
title: Senior Data Scientist
bio: Michael is a member of FirePower Capital's Value Maximization team, helping organizations leverage data to optimize operations, generate value and increase trust. He completed an MSc in Business Analytics at Ivey Business School and the Norwegian School of Economics and has previously completed an undergraduate degree in Financial Mathematics at Wilfrid Laurier University. Before joining FirePower, Michael completed his master's thesis in natural language processing and has work experience as a business intelligence analyst at a large Canadian bank.

name: Meagan Oppel
title: Senior Analyst
bio: Meagan is a Senior Analyst in Spearhead's Research & Analytics team. Before joining Spearhead, she served as a Senior Analyst at Benchmark International, focusing on South African M&A transactions as part of the research sell-side team. She also brings two years of experience from Woodbridge International, where she handled North American sell-side transactions. Meagan holds a Bachelor of Arts in Psychology and Social Science from the University of the Western Cape in South Africa.

name: Evgeny Soloho
title: Salesforce Architect, Lead Developer
bio: Evgeny Soloho serves as Spearhead's Salesforce Architect and Lead Developer. He holds Salesforce Certified Developer (DEV 401) credentials and brings 15+ years of advanced full-lifecycle Salesforce implementations for major firms including McCarthy Tetrault, Manulife, Mackenzie Investments, and BMO. He founded and leads WebSolo.ca, a growing Salesforce consultancy. Evgeny graduated from Vitebsk State Technological University in Belarus.

name: Natasha Hatzissauvas
title: Analyst
bio: Natasha serves as an Analyst within Spearhead's Research & Analytics division. She brings prior experience in financial operations and analysis, with background work in accounts receivable and process improvements within the insurance sector. Her educational credentials include an undergraduate degree in Economics from Wilfrid Laurier University and a Master of Management from the Schulich School of Business.

name: Erin Eady
title: Office Manager
bio: Erin oversees day-to-day office operations, maintaining an organized and efficient workplace environment. She brings extensive experience in office management, marketing, and event coordination across nonprofit and manufacturing sectors. Erin earned an Honours Bachelor of Business Administration with a Marketing concentration.

name: James McKay
title: Director, Revenue Operations
bio: James McKay leads planning and execution of Spearhead's revenue operations initiatives. He also serves as CEO of VEN, a consulting firm advising fast-growing software and tech-enabled service companies on revenue and sales operations challenges. Previously, McKay was a key executive team member at Clearco, where he focused on revenue operations and contributed to the company's growth from $50 million to $2.5 billion in valuation. He played a pivotal role in successfully raising a $100 million Series C in 2021. Before Clearco, he held the position of Director of Revenue Operations at TradeGecko, a VC-backed inventory management software company. McKay is an executive member at both Pavilion and the Operators Guild. He holds a BA (Hons) in English Literature from St. Thomas University.

name: Ann Cundangan
title: Controller
bio: Ann is responsible for the day-to-day financial recordkeeping activities for Spearhead Corp Dev.

name: Michael Stein
title: Co-founder, Chairman & CEO of the MPI Group
bio: Michael Stein is an experienced entrepreneur who co-founded the MPI Group, a property development and investment company. He established Canada's first apartment REIT (CAP REIT) and continues serving as Chairman. His board experience includes positions at Goldcorp Inc. (NYSE-listed natural resources) and FirstService Corp. (TSX-listed property management). He belongs to the Chief Executives Organization and World Presidents Organization. Stein holds an MBA from Columbia University and a BSc in Civil Engineering from Israel Institute of Technology.

name: Alan Chettiar
title: Leads FirePower Capital's M&A Advisory team
bio: Alan directs M&A Advisory operations and strategic initiatives at FirePower Capital. Previously a Principal at a boutique investment management firm, he brings over a decade of experience on the buy-side in venture capital (debt and equity) and private equity. His background includes working with hundreds of entrepreneurs on growth and strategic guidance. Chettiar earned an MBA from Ted Rogers School of Management, an LLB from Dalhousie University, and a Bachelor of Commerce from St. Mary's University.

name: Ilan Jacobson
title: Founding Partner & CEO of FirePower Capital
bio: Ilan transformed FirePower Capital from a small family office into an M&A and private capital firm. He leads strategic direction, guides major transactions, and evaluates direct investments for private capital funds. Jacobson is recognized as a speaker and moderator on entrepreneurship and M&A topics. He previously worked as a Portfolio Manager at a Toronto venture capital firm and holds an MBA from Ted Rogers School of Management and an Honours Science degree with a genetics specialization from the University of Western Ontario.
